school: School of Engineering and Applied Sciences (SEAS)
text: Instruction for paying tuition fees at NUM SEAS: Make a transaction to Golomt Bank account MN100015008125102476 (Name: NUM-INFORMATION TECHNOLOGY). If the student ID (23B1NUM****) is written correctly in the transaction description, the SISI account balance will be topped up after 10-20 minutes. If entered incorrectly, please contact the accountant of your affiliated school.

school: School of Engineering and Applied Sciences
text: Tuition fee per credit hour for SEAS students who enrolled before 2024-2025 for the 2025-2026 academic year: General Foundation course 135,600 MNT, Major Foundation course 134,500 MNT.

school: School of Engineering and Applied Sciences
text: Tuition fee per credit hour for SEAS students who enrolled in 2024-2025 for the 2025-2026 academic year: General Foundation course 168,100 MNT, Major Foundation course 180,200 MNT.

school: School of Engineering and Applied Sciences
text: Tuition fee per credit hour for new SEAS students enrolling in 2025-2026 for the 2025-2026 academic year: General Foundation course 177,100 MNT, Major Foundation course 189,900 MNT.
